held_out_queries: How long to a first decision, and how many reviewers will see my paper?
Submission fee? If I want open access what will it cost — waivers or Read-and-Publish?
Does JoC have a Registered Reports track, and is preregistration mandatory?

edits.summary: Add the approximate decision timeline (~90-120 days, 需复核) and reviewer count (usually 2-3, desk criteria not enumerated); expand the fee bullet to hybrid OA with Read-and-Publish coverage and Research4Life/discretionary waivers (exact APC 需复核); clarify preregistration is encouraged-not-required and that NO formal Registered Reports track is confirmed (do not assume one).
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 75 -> 99; approximate/unconfirmed items carried explicit live-check; acceptance rate not invented (absent)
